name: Buckwheat Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the milk in a (2 quart) saucepan just until bubbles form around the side of the pan.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the molasses, butter, warm water, yeast, salt, all-purpose flour, and buckwheat flour.
3. Allow mixture to cool until just warm.
4. Mix well with a wire whisk until smooth.
5. Cover and let rise in a warm place, away from drafts, until doubled in size (about 45 minutes).
6. Preheat the waffle iron.
7. Pour batter into the waffle iron to cover about 2/3 of the grid.
8. Spread batter evenly across the surface with a spatula.
9. Close the lid and cook until steaming stops.
10. Use a fork to carefully remove the finished waffle from the iron.
11. Repeat with remaining batter.
